notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Tolbert hits a sacrifice bunt. Throwing error by pitcher Shane McClanahan. Michael Massey scores. Tyler Tolbert to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Steven Matz. Tyler Tolbert scores. Kameron Misner to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Josh Rojas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Josh Rojas doubles (1) on a fly ball to center fielder Cedric Mullins. Nick Loftin scores.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
